step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the refined point about the potential overlap between median rhomboid glossitis and burning mouth syndrome. While median rhomboid glossitis itself isn't primarily caused by infections, its presence can lead to sensations akin to those described in burning mouth syndrome, especially if there’s underlying inflammation causing discomfort.
